items.title: OpenAI's o1 correctly diagnosed 67% of ER patients vs. 50-55% by triage doctors
items.summary: OpenAI's o1 model correctly diagnosed 67% of ER patients, outperforming triage doctors who scored 50-55%.
items.insight: Highlights AI's potential to augment medical triage, but also underscores the need for careful validation and human oversight in clinical settings.
items.english_title: OpenAI's o1 correctly diagnosed 67% of ER patients vs. 50-55% by triage doctors
